# Dancing with Comet Tails
## Scripture
"For we are God's handiwork, created in Christ Jesus to do good works, which God prepared in advance for us to do." - Ephesians 2:10

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the night sky, we witness the breathtaking spectacle of comets streaking across the horizon. Their luminous tails, like ethereal brushstrokes, paint the celestial canvas with an otherworldly beauty. These fleeting visitors remind us that our lives, like comets, are brief yet purposeful. We are not mere chance encounters in the vast expanse of God's universe; rather, we are intentionally crafted by His divine hand. Just as comets follow predetermined paths, our lives are designed to fulfill a specific purpose, ordained by God before the foundations of the world.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the majestic dance of comets, may we be reminded of the intentional design behind our existence. Help us to discern the good works You have prepared for us, and grant us the courage to pursue them with passion and purpose. Like the comet's tail, may our lives leave a radiant trail of love, hope, and faith, illuminating the darkness and pointing others to Your glory. May we dance with abandon, knowing that our brief journey has an eternal impact, and that You, our Creator, have orchestrated every step of the way.
